title: OES Config Schema
description: Configuration file for Open Engineering Standards (OES) AI rules alignment.

projectType.description: The target codebase architecture (web, flutter, or generic) used by OES.

rootFilePatterns.description: Sensible filename glob-like patterns allowed directly in root folder without triggering folder structure violations.

enforceFolderStructure.description: Ensure files are organized in standard folders like components, services, and utils.

enforceNamingConventions.description: Enforce PascalCase for components, camelCase for hooks (with 'use' prefix) and utilities, UPPER_CASE for constants.

preventDirectAPICalls.description: Disallow raw fetch/axios network calls inside frontend view/UI files.

enforceFormCAPTCHA.description: Require all public forms to implement CAPTCHA protection.

preventHardcodedColors.description: Enforce using CSS custom variables instead of hardcoded hex, rgb, or keyword colors.

enforceWebPImages.description: Enforce modern, optimized WebP/AVIF image targets and references instead of raw PNG/JPG.

preventCommittedSecrets.description: Prevent hardcoding or committing API keys, tokens, or credentials.

enforceComponentReusability.description: Audit components for size thresholds and inline styling abuses to enforce modular design.

services.description: Folders containing business logic / service / API files.

utils.description: Folders containing utility or helper functions.
